'''Bogga's palace''' was on [[Vo Dasha]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taboon]]. Bogga often stayed there with members of his court. It was the location of executions for the purposes of entertainment and socializing, and a hub of criminal activity in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

{{Struct-stub}}
